chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 142 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.03.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Hearing Mr. Jawaid Chaudhary, Advocate for applicant Syed Meeral Shah, D.P.G. In the instant Crime No. 65 of 2012 the applicant was granted pre-arrest bail vide order dated 14.6.2014 by the trial court. However, he remained absent thereafter and said order was recalled by the Trial Court vide order dated 26.11.2015 and issued N.B.Ws against the applicant. His counsel has argued that the applicant was taken away by some law enforcement agencies against which his father had filed CP No. D- 1828 of 2015 before this court and as a result whereof the applicant was released. Now he wants to surrender before the trial court but since the N.B.ws have been issued against him, he will be taken into custody in case without seeking protection from this court he appears before the Trial Court. His counsel has prayed for suspension of N.B.Ws for a particular period enabling the applicant to appear before the Trial Court. In support of his case, learned counsel has relied upon the case reported in 2002 P.Cr.L.J. 292. Syed Meeral Shah DPG has raised no objection. Accordingly N.B.Ws issued in pursuance of order dated 26.11.2015 are suspended for a period of 10 days from today till 20.3.2016 during which period the applicant shall surrender before the Trial Court and seek appropriate relief in terms of above pleas. This Bail Application in the above terms stands disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
